title: corydalis solida subsp. oligantha
intro: Corydalis solida subsp. oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae, commonly known as a type of corydalis, and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as berberine and protopine. The medicinal properties of Corydalis solida subsp. oligantha have been found to provide health benefits, including pain relief, improved sleep, and reduced stress, due to its ability to interact with opioid receptors in the brain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
